pageDescription: Small bag made grey silk. The little bag was constructed of four pieces. The mouthpiece is a square with a round hole in the centre, to which the sides of the bag were sewn. A circular piece was sewn to the lower end of the sides and a folded strip to the upper end. The strip forms a band for tying up the opening of the bag.
extractedText:
bag | British Museum
Small bag made grey silk. The little bag was constructed of four pieces. The mouthpiece is a square with a round hole in the centre, to which the sides of the bag were sewn. A circular piece was sewn to the lower end of the sides and a folded strip to the upper end. The strip forms a band for tying up the opening of the bag.

itemDraft.title: bag | 大英博物馆
itemDraft.summary: 灰色丝质小袋。这个小袋由四片材料构成。袋口是一块方形部件，中央有圆孔，袋身两侧缝合其上。下端缝有一片圆形部件，上端缝有一条折叠带。这条带子用于束紧袋口。
